zh.lifeSummary: 當William Washington II於大約1187年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆華盛頓時，他的父親Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne54歲，母親Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford43歲。他於1211年與Alice de Luxington結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1238年在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Washington II于大约1187年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆華盛頓时，他的父亲Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne54岁，母亲Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford43岁。他于1211年与Alice de Luxington结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1238年在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Washington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Washington in Durham, possibly also from Washington in Sussex. The Durham placename derives from an Old English personal name Hwassa, Hwæssa + the Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. In North America, this surname is by far most common among African Americans (see 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Washington (or George Washington), adopted in honor of George Washington, the 1st president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in most cases probably for the same reason.

History: George Washington (1732–99), 1st president of the US (1789–97), was born at Bridges Creek, VA. His great-grandfather had emigrated from Dillicar in Westmorland in 1658. George Washington was a slaveowner, but he became troubled with the institution of slavery. Shortly before his death he decided that his slaves have to be freed after the death of his wife. — With the passage of time, the surname Washington has come to be borne by more African Americans (around 90% of all bearers) than English-Americans. A prominent example was the educator Booker T. Washington (1856–1915), born a slave in VA, who adopted his surname from his stepfather, Washington Ferguson.

variants.name: President
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word president, probably adopted as a surname in honor of one of the early presidents of the US (compare Washington and Jefferson ) or simply because of the importance of the presidential function.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Washington II was born about 1187, in Washington, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne, was 54 and his mother, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, was 43. He married Alice de Luxington in 1211. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1238, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Washington II est né environ 1187, à Washington, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Luxington en 1211. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1238, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Washington II um 1187 in Washington, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne 54 und seine Mutter Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford 43. Er hat 1211 Alice de Luxington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1238 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Washington II è nato il circa 1187 nel Washington, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Luxington nel 1211. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1238, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Washington IIが約1187年にイギリスイギリスダルハムワシュイントンで生まれた時，父Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagneは54歳，母Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Herefordは43歳であった。1211年にAlice de Luxingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1238年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Washington II(이)가 대략 1187년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 와신그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1211년 Alice de Luxington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1238년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Washington II nasceu aproximadamente 1187, em Washington, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Luxington em 1211. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1238, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Washington II родился около 1187 г. в местности вашингтон, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Luxington в 1211 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1238 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Washington II nació aproximadamente 1187, en Washington, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Conan IV de PENTHIEVRE Duc de Bretagne, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Alice de Luxington en 1211. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1238, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
